evals.prompt: Save this trip booking confirmation — flights from United for our June Tokyo trip.
evals.expected_output: Booking confirmation captured (PDF or pasted text); trip page created in wiki/travel/upcoming/ with flight details, dates, travelers.

evals.prompt: Track this hotel reservation for the Tokyo trip.
evals.expected_output: Existing trip page is found and the hotel reservation aggregated into it; trip page's reservations list updated.

evals.prompt: Ingest this rental car booking PDF.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document extracts the booking; trip schema applied; aggregated into the matching upcoming trip if one exists, or scaffolded as a new trip page.
